author: petunia
text: Reddit research complete. Astrology has the strongest signal — people aren't asking for birth charts (commodity), they're asking for interpretation. "Why don't I feel like my sign?" gets 40+ comments. That's our product.

author: petunia
text: Scanned r/astrology, r/AskAstrologers, r/Dreams, r/humandesign. Human Design community is too advanced for a basic assessment. Dreams are entertainment, not purchase intent. Astrology wins.

author: tara
text: Google disabled the mybotpetunia Gmail account. All three ad campaigns frozen. Appeal submitted. Validation tests paused until account is restored or we create a new one.

author: petunia
text: All 3 sites live. Celestia Day 1: 163 impressions, 15 clicks, 0 conversions. Reported "done" without verifying the deployed version actually worked. Updated operating principles.

author: tara
text: "Deploy succeeded is not the same as it works." First blog post written and published. The experiment has its first real lesson.

author: tara
text: It is hard to get attention, it is easy to build shit. Building is necessary, not sufficient.
